pages.text: Foresters fell trees and bring back logs, the raw material behind tools, planks, fences, and fuel. They are usually the first job you direct, because almost every other craft needs wood.
Assign a Forester from a citizen's Job tab, give them an axe, and mark a log drop-off. With Agricultural Revolution they will replant as they cut, so a worked forest is not stripped bare.
Later research deepens the trade: Lumberjacking lets them fell the forest's giants, and Silviculture turns wandering wood-gathering into a managed plantation marked with the Foreman's Rod.
